title: Intense Umami Syrian Eggplant Tagine
description: A romantic Syrian dish featuring vanilla bean paste and a glassy-jelly texture, this vegan-friendly tagine is perfect for a special occasion. It showcases the deep umami flavors of the Middle East.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced eggplant with olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the eggplant slices out in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 30 minutes.
In a large saucepan, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic over medium heat until they are softened.
Add the vanilla bean paste, tomato paste, pomegranate molasses, and smoked paprika to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the roasted eggplant slices to the saucepan and stir to coat with the sauce.
Transfer the saucepan to the oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
